name: The magnitude of the warfarin-amiodarone drug-drug interaction

name: Drug Interactions Affecting Oral Anticoagulant Use | Circulation
snippet: Amiodarone is a moderate inhibitor of CYP2C9, which increases warfarin levels in proportion to the dose of amiodarone administered.

name: The effect of amiodarone on warfarin anticoagulation: a register
snippet: Data indicate that the interaction between warfarin and amiodarone results in an increased warfarin effect. There are several large, well‐performed studies ...

name: Warfarin Drug Interactions | Anticoagulation Clinic | UC San Diego
snippet: Complex interaction that takes place over 6-8 weeks. Ultimately expect 25-50% warfarin dose reduction. Check INR q1-2 weeks and make serial adjustments per INR.
